[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up, low-resolution image shows a side-profile portrait of a person with a dark background.

The main subject is a person shown from the shoulders up in profile, facing to the right. Their head is tilted slightly upward, and their mouth appears slightly open. Their hair appears light-colored and short, with a greenish-blue band or head covering across the top of the head, though details are unclear.

The setting is not clearly defined; the background appears as a solid dark area, suggesting an indoor or studio-like backdrop. Lighting is soft and blurry, with the subject’s face and hair rendered in indistinct colors.

No important visible text detected.

The image presents a blurred, close-up side view of a person’s face against a dark background. The colors are muted and the image resolution is low, making finer details unclear.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
